title: AI Engineer
description: Build and ship LLM-powered products. 1-3 yrs hands-on with PyTorch, RAG pipelines, vector databases, and serving inference at scale. Strong Python. Comfort with FastAPI/Docker. Bonus: experience fine-tuning open-weight models.

title: ML Engineer
description: Design and deploy ML models for enterprise clients. Required: Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch, SQL. Experience with model monitoring and Docker preferred. CV/NLP exposure a plus.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Object detection and segmentation for medical imaging. Must have YOLO/Detectron2 hands-on, PyTorch, OpenCV, and dataset curation experience. Edge deployment a strong plus.

title: Deep Learning Engineer
description: Train and serve CNN/Transformer models for retail vision. Strong PyTorch, distributed training, ONNX/TensorRT for inference. Experience with Triton or custom serving stacks.

title: GenAI Engineer
description: Own RAG and agent stacks for production chatbots. Must have built source-grounded QA systems with hallucination guardrails. Vector DBs (Pinecone/Weaviate/PGVector), LangChain or equivalent, prompt engineering. Python, FastAPI.

title: LLM Engineer
description: Build LLM evaluation harnesses and fine-tuning pipelines. Required: PyTorch, HuggingFace, prompt eng, RAG. Bonus: experience with vLLM, TGI, quantization. Strong systems mindset.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Model deployment and lifecycle management on cloud. Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, CI/CD. Python. Some ML modeling background expected; this is MLOps not pure DevOps.

title: Frontend Engineer (React)
description: Build payment dashboards in React, TypeScript, Next.js. Strong CSS, responsive design. 3+ yrs frontend.

title: AI Research Engineer
description: Research role on Indic LLMs. Pretraining, post-training, eval. Strong PyTorch, distributed training, deep ML fundamentals. Publications welcome.

title: Data Analyst
description: SQL-heavy analytics role on growth team. Tableau/Looker, Excel, basic Python for data wrangling. No ML required.
